Line Staff Recruitment & Executive Search

A Master Degree holder in HRM, The CEO and Lead Trainer is having 2 decades of expertise heading HR & Training Departments of top Hospitality Brands i.e. Hyatt, Ritz Carlton, IHG, Radisson Blu and Millennium Hotels in UAE, Bahrain, Qatar & KSA. Trained and Developed hundreds of hospitality professionals on all levels.

Having expertise in all areas of HR and L&D, he has transformed the Organizations he worked, with building HR Systems and Processes and introducing Corporate / Leadership and Organizational Development Programs.

He is a Certified Hospitality Trainer from Educational Institute of American Hotels & Lodging and Achiever of Advance Leader Bronze (ALB) & Advanced Communicator Bronze (ACB) from Leadership Institute of Toastmasters International. Also, Certified Leadership Trainer & Coach from Carlson Rezidor Business School (Radisson Hotels) and IHG Academy.  He is the “Silver Winner” of Middle East Excellence Award in HR & Training.  Also, ranked within 10 “most commended” out of 30 Best HR Leaders in Middle East

Training Methodology
Our  Training  Programs  are  inter-active  and conforming to the needs of modern Hospitality Industry Norms and digital advancements.   We  use  all  modern  tools  and  techniques  of conducting  effective  training  programs  via  role  plays, innovative training methods / simulations / questioning techniques, case studies and service standard evaluations to ensure the ultimate goal of providing exceptional customer service to the valued customers.

L&D Department is often perceived as the only Overhead expenses Department.  On the other hand, it is vital for any Organization to have L&D intervention.  In this scenario, TalenTiT can handle all Leadership & Soft Skills Training functions including   Employees’   Induction,   Brand   Orientation, Leadership and Service Enhancement Programs, on half the cost and double the efficiency.

Website info.pptx:
WORLD-CLASS HOSPITALITY TRAINING PROGRAMS
Our team of training experts brings a wealth of experience from the world’s leading hotel chains. Having set the highest standards of service and quality for top global organizations, we are passionate about extending that same excellence to partners who believe that exceptional service is the backbone of hospitality.

Our Specialized Offerings:
Bespoke Curriculum: Every program is fully customizable to meet the specific operational needs and culture of your hotel.
On-Site Excellence: We deliver industry-specific, in-company training sessions directly at your property for maximum convenience and impact.
Comprehensive Growth: We offer a diverse range of Soft Skills and Leadership Development programs, available as both exclusive in-house workshops and open-enrollment sessions.
Elevate Your Standards:  From frontline service to executive leadership, we provide the tools to transform your guest experience and empower your team.
Our Philosophy: Excellence is not an act, but a habit. We help your team build that habit every day.
TALENT HUNT / SEARCH & SELECTION
We understand the value of a precise Talent Hunt. As passionate recruiters with over two decades of recruitment expertise, we apply rigorous due diligence to identify candidates whose skills and behavioral traits align perfectly with your organizational needs, culture and customer service philosophy.

Why Choose Us?
Hospitality Specialists: Our team brings more than 25 years of experience hiring hospitality professionals at all levels. We ensure that international standards and global norms are strictly upheld throughout the pre-screening and selection process.
Strategic Retention: We guarantee our clients that talent retention is our #1 priority, starting from the very first point of contact.
Proven Expertise: Our approach combines deep industry knowledge with a commitment to finding the right fit for your unique corporate culture.
Your partner in building world-class teams
